title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services!
